market.advice: Breadth is broad and healthy - 67% of stocks above their 50-day MA, VIX calm at 16.3 and falling, SPY holding above its 50-day. This is one of the widest fields of clean STRONG BUY setups the scan has produced, led by financials, healthcare, utilities and REITs. Normal position sizing is appropriate, but several of today's picks (GE, SIRI, OKTA, SNA) are technically overbought - favor the less-extended names or wait for pullbacks on the stretched ones. The macro backdrop carries some geopolitical/oil-supply risk out of the Middle East, but it isn't showing up in volatility yet.

picks.name: Liquidia Corporation
picks.thesis: Cleanest setup in the whole scan — a textbook 5-contraction VCP within 1% of a 52-week high with RS at new highs, and a forward P/E of just 14x against explosive top-line growth as Yutrepia ramps. TradingView agrees (BUY, 14 buy/4 sell/8 neutral).
strengths: Cheap 14x forward P/E for the growth rate
risks: Volume-on-breakout criterion failed — light volume so far
Thin-float name, earnings not until ~37 days out
watch: Confirm the breakout holds above $79 on rising volume before adding

picks.name: Illumina, Inc.
picks.thesis: Genomics leader breaking to fresh highs with a confirmed VCP; TradingView's strongest possible read (STRONG_BUY, 16/1/9) backs the tape.
strengths: TV Strong Buy alignment, 16 buy vs 1 sell
watch: A pullback to the 50-day would be a lower-risk add point

picks.name: Eli Lilly and Company
picks.thesis: The GLP-1 franchise keeps compounding — RS at new highs, VCP intact, and TradingView's top rating (STRONG_BUY, 15/1/10) confirms institutional accumulation isn't slowing.
strengths: TV Strong Buy, 15 buy vs 1 sell
risks: Priced for perfection at 27x forward earnings
Any GLP-1 competitive or Medicare pricing headline is a real risk
watch: Medicare drug-pricing news flow
